name: oolio-pm
description: Oolio Product Management. A bundle of Oolio's product-management skills: the Virtual Product Council (convene-vpc and its operator, design, leadership, and STORM subcommittees, with a snapshot of the persona library), the JPD grooming loop (jpd-loop) and idea groomer (jpd-idea-groomer), the Jira epic helpers (jira-epic-groomer, jira-epic-titler), and grill-me for stress-testing a plan or decision. Groom discovery ideas, pressure-test decisions against personas and lenses, and keep Jira tidy to Oolio standards.
